name: Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. Warrant
summary: Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. Warrant entitles the holder to purchase one share of Class A common stock of Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company may pursue an initial business combination target in any industry or geographic region.
